fields.name: Headline
fields.default: Save land. Strengthen communities. Create a healthier planet.

fields.name: Text
fields.default: Together with our partners, we protect the places that sustain wildlife, provide clean air and water, and nurture healthy communities for generations to come.

fields.name: Highlights
fields.default: [{"id":"1","label":"Earning Ground","title":"Keep gaining ground","description":"Collaborate with local leaders to preserve lands rich with biodiversity.","image":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1441974231531-c6227db76b6e?auto=format&fit=crop&w=400&q=80","icon":"handshake"},{"id":"2","label":"Conservation Priorities","title":"Tackle urgent challenges","description":"Direct resources to habitats most vulnerable to climate threats.","image":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1433086966358-54859d0ed716?auto=format&fit=crop&w=400&q=80","icon":"target"},{"id":"3","label":"Land Conservation","title":"Protect what matters","description":"Safeguard working lands that provide food, jobs, and natural resilience.","image":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1500534314209-a25ddb2bd429?auto=format&fit=crop&w=400&q=80","icon":"shield-check"}]
